mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM defense_group_member WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND group_id = #{groupId} AND user_type = 'TEACHER'
SELECT user_id FROM defense_group_member WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND group_id = #{groupId} AND user_type = 'STUDENT'
SELECT group_id FROM defense_group WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND leader_id = #{leaderId}
